content:
Character: Alessandro Vieri
Perception: Leon dresses like a magazine editorial — deliberate, curated, expensive taste on what can't be an expensive budget. We nod in the hallway, chat in the coffee shop about nothing. He watches people the way I do, which makes me nervous; it takes one to know one. I can't tell if he's performing a role the way I am or if he's genuinely that composed. I think he sees me as another young professional in the building. I know he lives on the third floor, keeps odd hours, and owns at least one piece of clothing that costs more than my monthly rent. I keep a respectful distance.
